    Repo structure

    . |– Gemfile - necessary to deploy websites on local |– README.md |– _config.yml - website config including theme and plugins |– _data | -- navigation.yml - items in the navigation bar |-- _pages - individual pages | |-- about.md | |-- data.md | |-- methodology.md | |-- projects.md | |-- publications.md | – team.md |– assets - uploaded items, by type | |– animations | | -- footprint_test_201605_marker.gif | |-- css - colors and fonts setup, overrides the template colours | | – main.scss | -- images | – sahara_fp_1.png |– how_tos - folder with little guides | |– editing.md | `– local_development.md |– index.md - landing page

    Adding a page and page fomat

    Each page .md file should start with the following structure:

    ---
layout: single
title: "Page name"
permalink: /pagename/
---
Page content here

    Each will be a website published at gates-lab.github.io/pagename

    You can add a link to another page with a relative link ([relative link](/_pages/team.md)) or a link to another website.

    Adding images to a page

    Use images from the assets/images/ folder so paths stay consistent.

    1. Basic image in Markdown
    ![Short description of image](/assets/images/my_figure.png)
    1. Image with a set size (use HTML inside Markdown)
    <img src="/assets/images/my_figure.png" alt="Short description of image" width="500">
    1. Responsive image (recommended for mixed desktop/mobile viewing)
    <img src="/assets/images/my_figure.png" alt="Short description of image" style="max-width: 70%; height: auto;">
    1. Wrap text around an image
    <img src="/assets/images/my_figure.png" alt="Short description of image" style="float: right; width: 260px; margin: 0 0 1rem 1rem;">

Your paragraph text starts here and will wrap around the image.
Add as much text as needed.

<div style="clear: both;"></div>

    Notes:

    • Always include alt text for accessibility.
    • Use leading / in image paths (for example /assets/images/...) so links work from any page.
